title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama project: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: LangChain’s Ollama integration lets you call any Ollama-hosted model as a standard LangChain LLM.

title: ollama-python on PyPI
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama on npm
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama; runs in Node ≥ 18, Deno, and Bun.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat-style Web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI).

title: jmorganca/ollama
summary: Original creator’s repo; now redirects to ollama/ollama but still hosts issue history and early docs.

title: ollama/ollama-js
summary: Official Ollama JavaScript SDK source; mirrors npm package with examples & tests.

title: ollama/ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK source; mirrors PyPI package with async, embed, and multimodal examples.

title: ollama4j/ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; Spring Boot starters included.

title: richawo/ollama-instructor
summary: Tiny Python util to turn any Ollama model into an ‘instructor’ that returns Pydantic models.

title: thomas-michael-wallace/ollama-express
summary: Express.js middleware that exposes an OpenAI-compatible REST endpoint backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-rust on crates.io
summary: Rust crate providing async wrappers over Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-copilot on GitHub
summary: Bridge that lets GitHub Copilot use any Ollama model as its backend server.

title: logspace-ai/ollama-ai
summary: Lightweight Go client for Ollama with context caching and batch generate helpers.

title: ollama-discord-bot on GitHub
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm on GitHub
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-slack-bot on GitHub
summary: Slack Bolt app that integrates Ollama models into Slack threads and DMs.

title: ollama-rag on GitHub
summary: Minimal Retrieval-Augmented Generation stack using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain.
